title: MetaSignals
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/meta-signals.json — the meta-signals snapshot consumed by the planning loop and batch launcher for risk-aware prioritization. Written by scripts/ai/calculate-meta-signals.js. See docs/ai-native/meta-signals.md for calculator semantics and docs/ai-native/meta-signals-schema.md for field-level documentation.

snapshotVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

calculatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this snapshot was calculated.

inputSources.description: Metadata about the input log files used to produce this snapshot.

signals.description: The computed health signals aggregated from input logs.

healthLog.description: Path to the health NDJSON log file, or null if not provided.

heartbeatLog.description: Path to the heartbeat NDJSON log file, or null if not provided.

healthEntryCount.description: Number of entries parsed from the health log.

heartbeatEntryCount.description: Number of entries parsed from the heartbeat log.

failureScore.description: Aggregated failure severity weighted by category (0-100). Sum of category weights for red-state entries, capped at 100.

frictionScore.description: Friction from stale workers and no-output episodes (0-100). Sum of friction points from heartbeat states, capped at 100.

riskScore.description: Unresolved high-risk slices (0-100). Sum of severity points (high=20, medium=10), capped at 100.

cost.description: Elapsed worker-minutes in the batch window. Sum of elapsedMs across all heartbeat entries, converted to minutes.

trust.description: Inverse of failure+friction (100 = full trust). Formula: clamp(100 - (failureScore * 0.6 + frictionScore * 0.4), 0, 100).

topPain.description: Category with the highest recent failure count. "none" when no failures are recorded.
